learningObjectives.title: Understand Business Partner concept
learningObjectives.description: Explain Business Partner as the unified master data object in SAP S/4HANA and SAP TM.

learningObjectives.title: Identify BP roles and categories
learningObjectives.description: Recognize common business partner roles used across transportation planning and execution.

learningObjectives.title: Understand BP integration
learningObjectives.description: Describe Business Partner usage in carrier assignment, freight orders and settlement.

sections.content: Business Partner (BP) is one of the most important master data objects in SAP TM. It represents every organization or person involved in the transportation process, including customers, carriers, suppliers, logistics service providers and internal business entities.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: SAP S/4HANA uses the Business Partner concept as the single master data object replacing separate Customer and Vendor master records.

sections.title: Common BP Roles in SAP TM

sections.content: ABC Electronics creates DHL as a Business Partner with the Carrier role. During transportation planning, SAP TM automatically identifies DHL as an eligible carrier, assigns transportation resources and later settles freight charges using the same Business Partner.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global logistics company maintained more than 8,000 carriers as Business Partners. The same master data was reused for transportation planning, carrier collaboration and freight settlement, eliminating duplicate customer and vendor records.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: A very common SAP TM interview question is: 'Why did SAP replace Customer and Vendor with Business Partner?' Answer: to provide a unified master data model where one entity can perform multiple business roles.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Do not assume one Business Partner can have only one role. A single Business Partner can simultaneously act as a Customer, Supplier and Carrier depending on business requirements.

items: Business Partner is the central master data object in SAP S/4HANA.
One BP can have multiple business roles.
Carrier is maintained as a Business Partner.
Business Partner integrates with Locations and Freight Orders.
Business Partner supports planning, execution and freight settlement.
